scope_note: QA Obstruction-Aware Planner family [113]: family_extension of QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 [107]. Certifies that a planner correctly applies the arithmetic obstruction test from [112] before expanding its search frontier: forbidden targets (v_p=1) must be pruned with zero nodes expanded; allowed targets must proceed to search. Turns [112] bridge theorem from impossibility theory into algorithmic correctness guarantee.
